stories.headline: Thailand to slash tourist visa-free stays
stories.description: Southeast Asia’s tourism powerhouse to introduce new tiered visa system.

stories.headline: Gaza aid flotilla organisers say 41 boats intercepted, 10 still sailing
stories.description: Foreign ministers of 10 countries say Israel’s storming of the aid flotilla is a blatant violation of international law.

stories.headline: Ebola may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
stories.description: Hundreds of cases are suspected in central Africa but experts fear the actual number may be much higher.

stories.headline: Spain’s former PM Zapatero faces corruption probe
stories.description: High court is investigating Zapatero over airline aid, putting pressure on current PM.

stories.headline: Swinney defends food prices policy ahead of first minister vote
stories.description: The SNP leader says the proposed price cap on basic foodstuffs is not intended to force a fight with the UK government.
